title: rupicapnos africana subsp. corymbosa
intro: Rupicapnos africana subsp. corymbosa, also known as Horn Poppy or Horned Poppy, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Papaveraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Rupicapnos africana subsp. corymbosa is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be under the guidance of a medical professional.
